---
title: "descriptive"
format: html
---

```{r}
df
```



```{r}
summary(df$情報通信業雇用者数)          # 要約統計量
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

ggplot(df,
       aes(x = 年月,
           y = 情報通信業雇用者数)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "情報通信業雇用者数の推移",
    x = "年",
    y = "雇用者数（万人）"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
